spell.name: Cycle of Retribution
spell.success: The next time the target takes a hostile action, the target takes 1d4 mental damage; the spell's duration then ends.
spell.failure: The first time in a round when the target takes a hostile action, the target takes 1d4 mental damage.
spell.critical_failure: Each time the target takes a hostile action, the target takes 1d4 mental damage.

text: An understanding of how violence begets more violence fills your target, causing it mental anguish when it attempts to take violent actions. The target must attempt a Will saving throw.
